-- translated/fortest_bind/gosim_globals.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestbind

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

type Globals struct {
}

var globals gosimruntime.Global[Globals]

func initializers(initializeShared bool) {}
func G() *Globals                        { return globals.Get() }
func init() {
	gosimruntime.RegisterPackage("test/fortest_bind").Globals = &gosimruntime.Globals{Globals: &globals, Initializers: initializers}
}
func Bind1_0[T1 any](f func(v1 T1)) func(v1 T1) func() {
	return func(v1 T1) func() {
		return func() {
			f(v1)
		}
	}
}
-- translated/fortest_bind/gosim_globals_for_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestbind

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

type GlobalsForTest struct {
}

var globalsForTest gosimruntime.Global[GlobalsForTest]

func initializersForTest(initializeShared bool) {}
func GForTest() *GlobalsForTest                 { return globalsForTest.Get() }
func init() {
	gosimruntime.RegisterPackage("test/fortest_bind").ForTest = &gosimruntime.Globals{Globals: &globalsForTest, Initializers: initializersForTest}
}
func Bind3_0[T1, T2, T3 any](f func(v1 T1, v2 T2, v3 T3)) func(v1 T1, v2 T2, v3 T3) func() {
	return func(v1 T1, v2 T2, v3 T3) func() {
		return func() {
			f(v1, v2, v3)
		}
	}
}
-- translated/fortest_bind/gosim_meta_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestbind_test

import (
	testing_original "testing"

	"github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"
	"translated/github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/internal_/hooks/go123"
)

func init() {
	gosimruntime.SetAllTests([]gosimruntime.Test{})
}
func TestMain(m *testing_original.M) {
	gosimruntime.TestMain(go123.Runtime())
}
-- main.go --
package fortestbind

func RunWithOneArg() {
	x := 1
	go func(x int) {}(x)
}
-- translated/fortest_bind/main.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestbind

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

func RunWithOneArg() {
	x := 1
	gosimruntime.Go(Bind1_0(func(x int) {})(x))
}
-- main_test.go --
package fortestbind

func runWithThreeArgs() {
	go func(a, b, c int) {}(1, 2, 3)
}

func runWithOneArgToo() {
	x := 1
	go func(x int) {}(x)
}
-- translated/fortest_bind/main_test.go --
// Code generated by gosim. DO NOT EDIT.
package fortestbind

import "github.com/jellevandenhooff/gosim/gosimruntime"

func runWithThreeArgs() { gosimruntime.Go(Bind3_0(func(a, b, c int) {})(1, 2, 3)) }

func runWithOneArgToo() {
	x := 1
	gosimruntime.Go(Bind1_0(func(x int) {})(x))
}
